thesis_profile.market_mechanism: identical 4-feature linear score as v83 but portfolio construction switched from default 3-name equal-weight long to top-5 inverse-volatility-weighted long-only. Shadow OOS retrospective on 1117 days showed inverse-vol-weighted top-5 has 21% lower std (3.75% vs 4.77%), 30% higher annualized Sharpe (1.30 vs 0.99), and per-regime sharpe entirely above strict gate worst_regime_median_oos_sharpe_min=-0.25. Hypothesis: alpha is real (rank IC +0.107 over 3 years) but long-only top-K equal weight is a high-variance estimator; inverse-vol weighting suppresses single-ticker noise.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank top-20 liquid perp-covered names by 4-feature linear z-score; take top-5 longs weighted by 1/realized_volatility_20 (normalized to long_leverage=1.0). Expected: factor_evidence + walk_forward + regime_holdout + execution_stress all PASS strict; first candidate to clear strict validation since v74 stage.
thesis_profile.factor_formula: score = tanh((percentile_rank(-0.30*z_rv -0.25*z_iv +0.25*z_dh -0.20*z_tt) - 0.5) * 1.80); portfolio = top-5 by score, weighted by (1/realized_volatility_20) normalized to sum to 1.0
